programs.programName: SHINE (Serving Health Insurance Needs of Everyone)

verified.notes: SHINE is a health insurance counseling and information program, not a needs-based assistance program. It has no age, income, or asset eligibility requirements. The program serves Medicare-eligible individuals (typically 65+) and their caregivers, but eligibility is based on Medicare status, not age thresholds. No age test exists for seniors. Income and asset limits do not apply to SHINE itself, though counselors may discuss programs like Prescription Advantage (which has income limits: $64,400 single/$87,100 married as of 2022) and MassHealth that have their own separate eligibility criteria. Primary contact: MassOptions at 1-800-243-4636.
